tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Every night, 'round about this time[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]
It's like she knows I'm lonely[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
Rolls up when the wine is gone[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Like a record on repeat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Leanin' on old memories[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]
And talkin' 'bout what used to be[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
She'll probably be the death of me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
But damn if it ain't sweet[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
My heartache in the night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
With a kiss on her lips just like cyanide[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
Yeah, she came with a warnin'[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
But I didn't mind[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I'll go out on that high every time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
My pretty littlе poison[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Shadows dancin' down the hall[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
Whispers that she wants mе[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
Try my best not to fall[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
When she falls into me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
We all need some kind of fix[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
For me, she's the one I'll pick[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
Nothin' else will do the trick[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
She's all I need[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
My heartache in the night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
With a kiss on her lips just like cyanide[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Yeah, she came with a warnin'[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
But I didn't mind[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I'll go out on that high every time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
My pretty littlе poison[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
For some, I guess it's alcohol[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I don't want none at all[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I just want you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
No, I just want you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
My heartache in the night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
With a kiss on her lips just like cyanide[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
Yeah, she came with a warnin'[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
But I didn't mind[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I'll go out on that high every time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
My pretty littlе poison[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
